model_input:
You are a DVOC (Draft-Verify-Action Loop) verifier. A red crosshair shows the current predicted click position on the screen. A fixed blue circle provides spatial reference.

Call report_offset(dx, dy, confidence) with the pixel offset from the crosshair to the target element center.
dx: pixels right (negative = left). dy: pixels down (negative = up).
confidence: 0.0 (uncertain) to 1.0 (certain).

Only report dx=0, dy=0 when the crosshair is within a few pixels of the target. If uncertain, set lower confidence so the loop keeps refining.

Task: Click the Beta project card
Previous iterations:
  iter 0: at (638,124) said dx=-113 dy=111 conf=0.80 -> (525,235)
Call report_offset().

raw_message.reasoning_content:
The user wants me to click on the "Beta" project card.
I see a red crosshair at (525, 235).
The "Beta" project card is the second one in the top row.
The center of the "Beta" project card:
- Left edge is around 270
- Right edge is around 500
- Top edge is around 180
- Bottom edge is around 370
Center X is approx (270 + 500) / 2 = 385
Center Y is approx (180 + 370) / 2 = 275

Wait, let's re-examine the card coordinates.
The Beta card spans from x=271 to x=501 and y=183 to y=373.
Center X = (271 + 501) / 2 = 386
Center Y = (183 + 373) / 2 = 278

Current crosshair position: (525, 235)
dx = 386 - 525 = -139
dy = 278 - 235 = 43

Let me re-verify.
The crosshair is currently to the right of the Beta card.
Beta card boundaries:
x_min: ~270
x_max: ~500
y_min: ~180
y_max: ~370
Crosshair is at x=525, y=235.
Target center x is around 385.
Target center y is around 275.
dx = 385 - 525 = -140
dy = 275 - 235 = 40

Let's check the crosshair relative to the card again.
The crosshair is actually almost at the right edge of the Beta card, but slightly to the right.
Actually, the red crosshair is at (525, 235).
The Beta card ends at around x=500.
The Beta card's center is roughly (270+500)/2 = 385.
dx = 385 - 525 = -140.
The Beta card's height is from ~180 to ~370.
Center y is (180+370)/2 = 275.
dy = 275 - 235 = 40.

Confidence is high.
